appraisal_events.evidence: « Bloch, entraîné par le démon de sa mauvaise éducation… »; « n'est-il pas un peu gâteux ? »
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch is explicitly characterized as ill-bred and tactless, making an indiscreet, mocking remark that shocks Mme de Villeparisis and prompts her corrective display of status.

status_effects.explanation: Narrative emphasis on his bad manners and tactless mockery lowers his local standing.
